title: AnchorCore - Anchor
description: A clean, better looking anchor from the AnchorCore Pack perfect for Anchor PvP.
body:
# AnchorCore

Step into the shadows of combat with AnchorCore, a custom texture pack forged for anchor PvP players who demand both clarity and style. With a sleek aesthetic built around deep purples and glowing cyan accents, every element is crafted to sharpen your edge in battle and look good doing it.

• Clean, Good Looking Better for PvP

![Demo AnchorCore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DnerjLso/images/c00bb2223e0c34bfe2dd150fec4ab155fa98eea3.png)
